payload.answer: Compiled durable memory: Sam has left Goldman and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; Sam is interested in discussing AI infrastructure with Daniele and receiving the article.
citations: Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
